name: skillopt
description: Use Microsoft SkillOpt to train reusable agent skill documents from scored rollouts.

interface.shortDescription: Train reusable skills from scored agent rollouts.
interface.longDescription: SkillOpt brings Microsoft Research's text-space optimizer into the Eidos workflow. Use it to turn rollout evidence, validation scores, and token-waste patterns into bounded edits on a deployable skill document, including Tokut-style remediation loops for thrashing and runaway AI cost.
defaultPrompt: Use SkillOpt to optimize this agent skill from scored rollouts.
Use SkillOpt to turn token-thrashing evidence into a better skill.
Bootstrap Microsoft SkillOpt for a local Eidos experiment.
